SpecName: Leadership in a Gen AI World - Character Emotion Portrait Set
SpecPurpose: Generate consistent individual transparent 512x512 circular face portraits for each approved workshop character and emotion.
VisualSystem: Leadership in a Gen AI World - Centaur Visual System

ApprovedStyleSamples.Use: Approved medallion style, linework, palette, and character rendering.
Approved tighter face-only crop for individual emotion assets.

GenerationBackground.Technique: flat chroma key plus local removal
GenerationBackground.Rule: The chroma-key color must appear only outside the circular medallion and nowhere in the character, frame, or parchment fill.

SharedStyle.Rendering: Bright mythic-adventure polished storybook illustration matching the approved sample.
SharedStyle.Linework: Clean warm dark outlines with varied weight and rounded ends.
SharedStyle.Shading: Smooth painterly cell shading with warm highlights and subtle occlusion.
Palette: character-specific skin, hair, fur, and wardrobe colors from references
SharedStyle.Texture: Subtle parchment texture inside the medallion only; no background texture outside it.
SharedStyle.Mood: Expressive, smart, playful, workshop-appropriate, premium but not photorealistic.

Composition.Frame: One centered perfectly circular portrait medallion with a thin antique-gold and ink-navy circular accent.
Composition.Crop: Very tight face close-up. Face fills most of the circle, top of hair and chin comfortably inside the frame, only a hint of neck visible, no shoulders and no upper torso.
Composition.Padding: Keep the full circular frame visible with a small transparent margin around it after final 512x512 normalization.
Composition.InsideCircle: Warm parchment fill only; no scenery, props, symbols, or labels.

Characters.Description: Warm tan skin, long wavy dark brown hair framing the face, expressive dark eyebrows and eyes, white draped top barely visible or not visible.
Warm tan skin, short tousled brown hair, youthful gender-neutral face, expressive dark eyebrows and eyes, gray sleeveless top barely visible or not visible.
Friendly humorous horse head, brown coat, dark mane, expressive horse eyes and brows, white shirt collar barely visible or not visible; awkward but not grotesque.
Warm tan skin, wavy dark brown hair, strong dark brows, friendly heroic face, white draped top barely visible or not visible.

Emotions.Expression: Sad but dignified: inner brows lifted, softened eyes, small downturned mouth, no tears.
Angry but controlled: brows drawn down, focused eyes, tight mouth, determined tension, not shouting.
Surprised: raised brows, widened eyes, small open mouth or parted lips, alert rather than frightened.
Tired: heavy eyelids, softened posture in the face, faint under-eye fatigue, relaxed mouth, not sad.
Happy: warm genuine smile, bright eyes, relaxed brows, friendly confidence.
Stressed: tense brows, slightly wide or worried eyes, compressed mouth, controlled workplace pressure, not panic.
Thoughtful: focused eyes, slightly raised or knit brows, closed contemplative mouth, reflective and intelligent.
Bored: half-lidded eyes, flat or mildly pursed mouth, low-energy expression, not sleepy.
Skeptical, not angry: one raised eyebrow, slightly narrowed eyes, small asymmetrical doubtful mouth, smart and playful.

PromptTemplate.Prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: individual 512x512 transparent PNG character-emotion portrait
Primary request: Create a single tight circular face portrait of the established {characterDisplayName} character from the reference sheet, showing the emotion {emotionDisplayName}.
Scene/backdrop: The only background outside the circular portrait medallion must be a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. No shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, scenery, floor plane, or lighting variation outside the medallion. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere inside the subject or medallion.
Subject: {characterDescription}
Expression: {emotionExpression}
Style/medium: Match the approved sample style exactly: bright mythic-adventure polished storybook illustration, clean warm dark outlines, smooth painterly cell shading, warm highlights, premium friendly character-study rendering.
Composition/framing: Square image, one centered perfectly circular medallion. Very tight close-up: face fills most of the circle, top of hair and chin comfortably inside frame, only a hint of neck, no shoulders, no upper torso. Facing the camera directly. Keep the full circular frame visible with a thin antique gold and ink navy circular accent, warm parchment fill inside the circle. Outside the circle remains flat #ff00ff.
Constraints: no text, no labels, no watermark, no fake lettering, no photorealism, no flat corporate vector style, no cyberpunk, no scenery, no full body, no shoulders or torso.
